title: ollama extension: Gemini 3 thinking models fail with 400 "missing thought_signature" in tool calls
summary:
## Summary

The bundled `ollama` extension at `~/.gsd/agent/extensions/ollama/ollama-chat-provider.js` only handles `<think>...</think>` inline thinking format. It does not propagate Gemini 3's structured `thoughtSignature` field, so the first tool call against any Gemini 3 cloud model returns HTTP

title: 10 minutes http client timeout is too low when image generation is done on CPU
summary:
### What is the issue?

[This line](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/x/imagegen/server.go#L58) sets the 10 minute timeout regardless of the hardware.

This is maybe fine on a GPU, but is certainly too low for a CPU.
The timeout should be at least an hour or more when CPU is used.

### Rele

title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.


### OS

_No response_

title: [PR] fix(MetadataSync): gate record-level skip on --incremental
summary:

title: [PR] Add Seer provider: local PaliGemma2 image descriptions
summary:
## What this adds
                   
  A new **Seer** provider that calls a local [Seer daemon](https://github.com/recursia-lab/Seer) running PaliGemma2 on the user's own machine. No API key, no cloud, no subscription.

title: [PR] Local Formatting Model: bundled Python cleanup CLI (rules / MLX / auto)
summary:
## Summary

Adds a new **Local Formatting Model** LLM provider — a fully-local cleanup path that runs through a bundled Python CLI (`macparakeet-cleanup`). It can do deterministic rules-only cleanup, run a local MLX model, or auto-route between the two based on input complexity. No network, no API k
